Health & wellness · Social media · Mama life · Los Angeles

My Story

From model
to mama

"I moved to LA as a model and stayed for love, sunshine, and the most unexpected, beautiful chapter of my life."

Originally from the UK, I landed in Los Angeles over a decade ago as a beauty model — and fell completely head over heels. Not just for the city, but for the man who would become my husband (and partner in crime), Rowly. Together we've built a life full of creativity, sunshine, and the kind of beautiful chaos that comes with two little ones, our two girls.

These days I split my time between beauty and wellness blogging, exploring all that LA has to offer with the girls, and collaborating with brands I genuinely love. Welcome to my corner of the internet — I'm so glad you're here.

11 Years in LA
20k Followers
2 Beautiful Girls

What I cover

Three worlds,
one beautiful life

✨

Beauty

From glowy skincare routines to editorial makeup looks, I share the products and rituals that genuinely make a difference to my skin, my look, and my confidence.

Wellness

Purebarre, yoga, postnatal fitness, and everything in between. Wellness isn't a trend for me — it's the foundation that keeps this mama going strong.

Mama Life

Real talk on motherhood, toddler adventures, baby essentials, and the joy (and chaos!) of raising two little girls in the most incredible city in the world.

Explore Mama Life →

Featured

Clean beauty,
real results

I've spent years navigating the beauty world — from model calls to the shelves of every Sephora in LA — and I've built a tight edit of brands and routines I truly stand behind. Expect honest reviews, glowy tutorials, and the real story behind what I actually use day to day.

Read Beauty Edits

Move. Breathe. Restore.

Wellness for real life

As a mama of two, self-care isn't a luxury — it's a necessity. I've found my rhythm with Purebarre, yoga, and long beach walks along the Marina. Whether you're postnatal, sleep-deprived, or just trying to find ten minutes for yourself, I've got you.
